commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a dynamic `/model` argument menu from configured or allowed model catalogs, extends command choice context with allowed model catalog data, and adds registry tests.

PR surface: Source +52, Tests +76. Total +128 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: with the PR head, bare `/model` resolves a shared arg menu before Discord's dedicated picker and Telegram builds raw `tgcmd:/model ...` callbacks from those choices. I did not run a live Slack, Discord, or Telegram workspace in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The explicit human-review label plus cross-channel `/model` UX and transport-limit findings need maintainer resolution before the automerge lane can continue.

target.title: feat: add model switch choices to /model
target.author: clawsean

commands.reason: PR is paused for human review
